raw_consumer_statement:
I made a {$140.00} purchase from XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX 
I returned due to incorrect item and received the same item back. 
XXXX from their customer service offered full refund upon receipt of returned item I returned the item on XX/XX/XXXX but did not receive a refund. The tracking number shows they received the item on XX/XX/XXXX. I filed a dispute with Citibank and they gave me a provisional credit. I was updated of the status of my dispute by mail. On XX/XX/XXXX I go to my account and notice they are re charged me {$140.00} as they had closed the dispute, there was a letter in my account stating this. I emailed them and send copies of the tracking info and email from XXXX. I called Citibank today because I had not heard from them, I spoke to XXXX who offered me {$100.00} to close the dispute, I said I wanted the entire amount. He gave me to supervisor XXXX who said I waited too long to respond to their letter ( again, letter was not mailed like previous letters, it was only posted in my account. He then gave me to XXXX who stated he was a " high level '' supervisor and told me the same thing. I complained and he said he would " ask '' the investigators if they would let me continue with the dispute.
